title: Tim Cook turned Apple into a $4 trillion juggernaut by not trying to be Steve Jobs
summary_full: Tim Cook's 15-year tenure at the helm of Apple was highly profitable for Wall Street, as the company's market cap swelled from $350 billion to $4 trillion.
summary_public: Tim Cook's 15-year tenure at the helm of Apple was highly profitable for Wall Street, as the company's market cap swelled from $350 billion to $4 trillion.
